# VLM called only at state-machine decision points

`REQ-event-driven-planning`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| requirement | draft |

The planner shall be invoked only when the state machine fires a decision event (altitude_reached, waypoint_reached, no_progress). It shall not be called on a fixed time interval. This ensures each VLM call is semantically meaningful and the model always has a relevant trigger.

**Rationale.** Time-driven polling would call the VLM mid-manoeuvre when no decision is needed, wasting inference budget and producing nonsense commands.

**Fit criterion.** `Planner.decide_with_context is called only from StateMachine._llm_decision, which is called only from event handlers.`

**Verification method:** inspection · **priority:** shall · **verification status:** unverified
